Public REST API for RF propagation modeling, coverage analysis, mesh and multisite planning, HF propagation, 3D coverage, satellite modeling, interference detection, signal geo-location, archive and export, clutter and noise data, and reusable templates. Operations, paths, and methods are documented in the CloudRF developer guide and Swagger UI.
